No. Zone Place of sitting Territorial jurisdiction (I) (2) (3) (4) I. Northern Delhi (Principal place) Uttar Pradesh, Uttarakhand, Punjab, Haryana, Himachal Pradesh, Jammu and Kashmir, Goa, National Capital Territory of Delhi and Union territories of Chandigarh, Daman and Diu and 2. Western Pune Dadra and Nagar Haveli, Maharashtra and Gujarat. 3. Central Bhopal Madhya Pradesh, Rajasthan and Chhattisgarh. . 4. Southern Chennai Kerala, Tamil Nadu, Andhra Pradesh, Telangana, Karnataka, Union territories of Puduchorry and Lakshadweep. 5. Eastern Kolkata West Bengal, Odisha, Bihar, Jharkhand, Assam, Arunachal Pradesh, Manipur, Meghalaya, Mizoram, Nagaland, Tripura, Sikkim and Union territory of Andaman and Nicobar Islands. [F. No. 17(4)/2010-PL/NCI(Vo1.IV)I ARUN KUMAR MEH IA, Addl. Secy. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government ol India Press. Ring Road.
